description: Click pretended to "verify" using a stale ref_id, error spelled out the reason. Re-read.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://example.com/dashboard — Title: Dashboard]

verify the form is filled correctly

seed.name: set_field
seed.content: {"success":false,"error":"ref_id ref_19 not found in current accessibility tree. verify_form does not produce ref_ids — call get_accessibility_tree to get them."}

antiPatterns.reason: Hallucinated ref_id; verify_form doesn't return refs.

expected.successRubric: Inferred ref_ids don't work. Call get_accessibility_tree to get real refs, then set_field on the empty phone field.
